implementation_summary: Extended existing execution and smart-scrape lanes to preserve the best successful lane result when later escalation fails or returns fewer items, and added a Trustpilot source-level fallback that does not fake review text. Local ASGI smoke now closes the previously persistent example.com, httpbin.org/html, Trustpilot smart scrape, and Trustpilot template execute failures. Live production H1 remains pending until these local changes are deployed. Production live H1 rerun has now passed all 56 tests.
